full_description: HabitTracker is a simple app that helps users track and maintain their daily habits. It provides a customizable habit list and reminders to ensure consistency. With HabitTracker, you can easily create and manage your habits, set reminders, and monitor your progress. The app is designed to be user-friendly and intuitive, making it easy to stay on track with your daily routines. Whether you want to start a new exercise routine, read more books, or simply drink more water, HabitTracker is the perfect tool to help you achieve your goals.
